name: Chengdu Information Technology of The Chinese Academy of Sciences Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Information Technology of The Chinese Academy of Sciences Co., Ltd. provides intelligent engineering, and related products and technical services to government, tobacco, oil and gas, special printing, and other industries. It offers election equipment and service for party and national conferences; testing equipment for the national printing industry; and intelligent city key technology, platform system, and transportation solutions based on cloud computing, large data, Internet of Things, and mobile Internet for government. The company also provides various solutions for tobacco industry comprising tobacco planting expert analysis system; tobacco leaf digital storage and logistics integrated platform; data collection and intelligent diagnosis and analysis system in cigarette factory; life cycle tracking and management system for cigarette accessories; cigarette research and development information management system; and tobacco logistics park information infrastructure construction solutions. In addition, it offers inspection equipment for banknote printing industry, such as large bill quality inspection machines, banknote printed gravure online detection systems, paper machine online quality inspection systems, cutting quality on line detection systems, and banknote sorting machines; and oil and gas industry information construction solutions, including oil and gas field digital production management solution, as well as integrates electronic logging, automatic collection, real-time monitoring, intelligent defense, management, and scientific command solutions. Chengdu Information Technology of The Chinese Academy of Sciences Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is based in Chengdu, China.
